The '''Mascot Moon''' of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] had the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy]] seal carved on it around [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. In [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]], as a prank, [[Mako Spince]] stole a gram of [[antimatter]] and tried to use it to blow the seal off of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Unfortunately for him, he underestimated the power of the explosive, and accidentally destroyed the whole moon. He was expelled from the Academy as punishment for this.
